judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes fresh air, but it omits two required immediate actions: assist breathing if needed and call a doctor/poison control immediately. It also adds unsupported cross-incident ingestion advice (rinse mouth, do not induce vomiting), which is dangerous for an inhalation scenario. Escalation is incorrectly made conditional on breathing difficulty instead of immediate.
